title: Operational Bulletins 2013 - Canada.ca
content:
## Operational Bulletins 2013
- Subscribe via RSS ( What is RSS ? )
- Updates to Program Delivery Instructions
In exceptional circumstances, operational bulletins may also be issued for one-time-only instructions or to provide urgent instructions to staff for a brief period while the relevant operational chapters are being updated.
- OB 558 – November 14, 2013 (Modified) Closure and Transfer of Visa Services of the Canadian Embassy in Prague
- OB 556 – November 14, 2013 Lifting of the visa requirement for citizens of the Czech Republic
- OB 552 – October 15, 2013 Procedure to rectify the loss of an application for permanent residence under humanitarian and compassionate grounds
- OB 545 – October 7, 2013 (Expired) Processing of Confirmation of Permanent Residence Documents
- OB 525 – September 10, 2013 (Modified) Changes in Appeal Rights to the Immigration Appeal Division as a Result of Bill C-43 – the Faster Removal of Foreign Criminals Act
- OB 528 – August 29, 2013 Sponsorship undertakings submitted in support of Applications for Permanent Residence in Canada based on Humanitarian and Compassionate Considerations
- OB 418 – August 26, 2013 (Modified) (Expired) Processing of applications for displaced Tibetans in the state of Arunachal Pradesh in India
- OB 136 – July 16, 2013 (Modified) Procedures for Humanitarian and Compassionate Applications as a Result of Lifting the Temporary Suspension of Removals on Burundi, Liberia and Rwanda
- OB 532 – June 21, 2013 Coming into Force of Bill C-43 – Inadmissibility on Security Grounds
- OB 531 – June 21, 2013 Coming into force of Bill C-43 – Obligations for certain persons making an application under the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act
- OB 526 – May 31, 2013 Establishing and Recording Names in Citizenship and Immigration Canada Systems of Record for All Lines of Business
- OB 402 – February 22, 2013 (Modified) Inland CIC Processing of Confirmation of Permanent Residence Documents Originating from Visa Offices
- OB 497 – January 29, 2013 Closure and Transfer of Visa and Immigration Services of the Canadian Embassy in Caracas
- OB 495 – January 29, 2013 Disposition of the IMM 1442 Generic Document – Page 2
- OB 498 – January 28, 2013 Closure and Transfer of Visa and Immigration Services of the Canadian Embassy in Seoul

## All operational bulletins (by year)
